sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Iowa American Water Celebrates 140 Years of Service
feed.summary: Iowa American Water is celebrating its 140th anniversary in 2026, marking a significant milestone for its parent company, American Water. The company plans to invest over $52 million in infrastructure upgrades in Iowa in 2026 to enhance service reliability and affordability. With 85 employees, Iowa American Water is dedicated to providing safe and reliable water services to 225,000 residents across the state.

feed.title: TransDigm (NYSE: TDG) Co-COO sells 3,900 shares after option exercise
feed.summary: TransDigm Group's Co-Chief Operating Officer Joel Reiss exercised stock options for 3,900 shares at $284.97 per share and subsequently sold all 3,900 shares in multiple open-market transactions. The sale prices ranged from $1,273.85 to $1,294.80 per share. Following these transactions, Reiss directly holds 3,600 shares of TransDigm common stock.

feed.title: J.M. Smucker Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1.10 a Share, Payable June 1 to Holders of Record May 15
feed.summary: J.M. Smucker has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $1.10 per share. This dividend is payable on June 1 to shareholders of record as of May 15. The announcement was made amidst recent analyst adjustments to the company's price target.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Trading Up 1.2% After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) shares rose 1.2% after Truist Financial increased its price target to $332 from $323, maintaining a Hold rating. The stock traded near $310 on lower-than-average volume. The bank reported strong Q1 results, with EPS of $5.94 and revenue of $50.54 billion, but management warned of trimmed net-interest-income outlook and potential limitations on buybacks.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Shares Up 4.2% Following Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) saw its shares increase by 4.2% after JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target from $190 to $200, maintaining an "overweight" rating. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $0.82 EPS and $2.49 billion in revenue. Despite some insider selling, institutional investors hold a significant majority of the stock, while analysts generally rate it as a "Buy" with a consensus target price of $177.83.

feed.title: Rivian (RIVN) CEO trims stake with 21,446-share Rule 10b5-1 sale
feed.summary: Rivian Automotive CEO Robert J. Scaringe sold 21,446 shares of Class A common stock on April 14, 2026. This open-market transaction, valued at approximately $346,782, was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following the sale, Scaringe maintains a substantial stake in Rivian, holding over one million shares directly and additional shares indirectly through an LLC and a trust.

feed.title: International Paper Company (NYSE:IP) entered into an agreement to acquire North Pacific Paper Corporation from One Rock Capital Partners, LLC for $360 million.
feed.summary: International Paper Company (NYSE:IP) has agreed to acquire North Pacific Paper Corporation from One Rock Capital Partners, LLC for $360 million. This transaction, announced on April 16, 2026, is subject to regulatory approval. International Paper is a major global producer of paper and wood products, with significant operations in the United States.

feed.title: BNY Mellon (NYSE: BK) Sr. EVP Perez reports initial insider holdings
feed.summary: Alejandro Perez, Sr. Executive Vice President at BNY Mellon (NYSE: BK), has filed an initial Form 3, reporting his beneficial ownership of the company's stock. The filing shows direct ownership of 76,116.761 shares and indirect ownership of 1,806.0786 shares through a 401(k) plan. This Form 3 establishes his baseline holdings as an insider and indicates no purchase or sale transactions in this initial report.

feed.title: The RealReal will post quarterly results May 7, then host a webcast
feed.summary: The RealReal (Nasdaq: REAL) is set to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on May 7, 2026. Following the earnings release, the company will host a conference call and live webcast at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss the results. Historically, announcements regarding earnings call timings have shown minimal impact on the stock's price.

feed.title: Free Atlanta e-waste drop-off marks 16 years of Earth Day effort
feed.summary: Georgia Natural Gas is hosting a free electronics recycling event in Atlanta on April 25, 2026, at Lenox Square, marking its 16th year of Earth Day efforts. This initiative highlights the company's Greener Life program, which has helped offset nearly 1 billion pounds of CO₂e. Attendees can recycle various electronic devices, learn about carbon offsetting, and enter giveaways.

feed.title: Man with AR-style pistol arrested at Aetna Hartford headquarters, police say
feed.summary: A 51-year-old man, Denrey Wadlington, was arrested after entering Aetna's Hartford headquarters armed with an AR-style pistol. He was apprehended by building security within minutes and subsequently charged with criminal trespass, firearm possession, illegal assault weapon possession, and possession of a large capacity magazine. Police are investigating the incident, and no injuries were reported.

feed.title: Class-action lawsuit filed against Hasbro after data breach
feed.summary: A class-action lawsuit has been filed against Hasbro following a data breach reported earlier this month. The lawsuit, filed by current and former employees, alleges that Hasbro was negligent in protecting their personal information and has not been transparent about the extent of the data breach. The plaintiffs are seeking damages and restitution in the federal court of Rhode Island.

feed.title: Quantify 2x Daily Alt Season Crypto ETF (QXAS) to Close
feed.summary: Quantify Funds, in coordination with Tidal Investments LLC, has announced the closure and liquidation of the Quantify 2x Daily Alt Season Crypto ETF (QXAS). The fund will cease trading on April 23, 2026, and will liquidate its portfolio by April 30, 2026, distributing remaining net assets to shareholders. This decision follows a comprehensive review and is deemed to be in the best interests of shareholders.

feed.title: CH Robinson Worldwide Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: CH Robinson Worldwide Inc. (CHRW) stock saw a positive performance on a recent trading day, outperforming its competitors. The stock closed at $89.04, marking a gain of $0.09 (0.10%). This positive movement defied a broader negative trend for the transportation sector.

feed.title: Mosaic Co. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: The article states that Mosaic Co. (MOS) stock performed better than its competitors on a recent trading day. This suggests potential positive investor sentiment or strong market performance for the company.

feed.title: Iowa American Water Parent Company Celebrates 140 Years of Providing Safe and Reliable Water and Wastewater Services to Customers and Communities in 2026 – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: Iowa American Water, a subsidiary of American Water, is celebrating American Water's 140-year anniversary of providing water and wastewater services. The company plans to invest over $52 million in infrastructure upgrades in Iowa in 2026 and will mark milestones such as the 30th anniversary of its Project Help to Others program and the 15th anniversary of the American Water Charitable Foundation. American Water, founded in 1886, serves over 14 million people across 14 states and 18 military installations.

feed.title: Water utility serving 225,000 Iowans plans $52M in 2026 upgrades
feed.summary: Iowa American Water, a subsidiary of American Water, announced plans to invest over $52 million in infrastructure upgrades in Iowa during 2026. This investment coincides with American Water's 140th anniversary, reflecting a continued commitment to providing safe and reliable water services to approximately 225,000 Iowans. The company also highlighted milestones for community programs like Project Help to Others and the American Water Charitable Foundation.

feed.title: Unusual Options Activity: CSX, ITUB and Others Attract Market Bets, CSX V/OI Ratio Reaches 361.4
feed.summary: This article highlights unusual options activity observed in several stocks, including CSX and Itau Unibanco Holding. CSX in particular caught attention due to its exceptionally high options volume to open interest ratio of 361.4, driven by a significant number of calls. The analysis suggests that large block trades were executed, indicating potential institutional interest or informed trading.

feed.title: Dividend equivalents boost Host Hotels (HST) director holdings
feed.summary: Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) director Diana Laing reported an acquisition of 389.3268 dividend equivalent rights. These rights, which represent the right to receive common stock, accrued on her existing deferred stock units and will be settled in Host Hotels common stock at a future date she selects. Following this transaction, her direct holdings of such derivative units total 4,443.8268.

feed.title: Host Hotels (NYSE: HST) director granted 1,565.8478 dividend unit rights
feed.summary: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. director Gordon H. Smith was granted 1,565.8478 deferred stock unit dividend equivalent rights, as reported in a recent Form 4 filing. These rights represent one share of common stock each and accrued on his existing deferred stock units. Following this transaction, Smith's total deferred stock unit balance is 41,719.1832 units, which will be settled in common shares at a later date of his choosing under the company’s Non-Employee Directors’ Deferred Stock Compensation Plan.

feed.title: DoE rejects CenterPoint Energy's request to close Indiana coal plant (CNP:NYSE)
feed.summary: The U.S. Department of Energy (DoE) has rejected CenterPoint Energy's request to close its 60-year-old F.B. Culley coal plant in Indiana. This decision, reported by Bloomberg, reflects the Trump administration's policy of keeping older coal plants operational.

feed.title: CON EDISON DECLARES COMMON STOCK DIVIDEND
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) has declared a quarterly dividend of 88.75 cents a share on its common stock. The dividend is payable on June 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 13, 2026. The company is a holding company providing various energy-related products and services through its subsidiaries.

feed.title: Con Edison investors get 88.75 cents a share on June 15
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison (NYSE: ED) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0875 per share on common stock. This dividend is payable on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 13, 2026. The announcement highlights Con Edison's consistent policy of returning cash to investors, with the company operating regulated electric, gas, and steam utilities in New York and northern New Jersey.

feed.title: Shareholders at Moody’s (NYSE: MCO) approve board slate, KPMG and pay
feed.summary: Moody's Corporation shareholders approved the election of ten directors, ratified KPMG LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for 2026, and endorsed the executive compensation program at their 2026 Annual Meeting. All proposals received substantial support, reflecting broad agreement with the company's governance and compensation practices. The meeting's results, detailed in an 8-K filing, confirm continuity for the board and key financial oversight.

feed.title: Xcel Energy: Before you dig into spring landscaping projects, Call 8-1-1
feed.summary: Xcel Energy urges customers to call 8-1-1 before any digging projects to locate underground utility lines, especially as April marks National Safe Digging Month. This free service helps prevent injuries, property damage, outages, and fines, as digging without locates caused 4 incidents to Xcel Energy's electric infrastructure in Texas and New Mexico in 2025. Homeowners and contractors should contact 8-1-1 at least two business days prior to digging, regardless of project size, to ensure safety and prevent disruption of essential services.

feed.title: Portillo's (PTLO) director receives 12,681 restricted stock units in equity grant
feed.summary: Portillo's Inc. director Eugene I. Lee Jr. was granted 12,681 restricted stock units of Class A common stock on April 15, 2026. These units will fully vest on December 31, 2026, provided he remains with the company. Following this grant, Lee Jr. directly holds 73,479 shares and indirectly owns 416,250 Class A shares through a family trust.

feed.title: Portillo's Inc. (PTLO) grants 40,760 RSUs to its general counsel
feed.summary: Portillo's Inc. (PTLO) announced that its General Counsel and Secretary, Kelly M. Kaiser, was granted 40,760 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 15, 2026. These RSUs will vest in three equal annual installments, contingent on her continued service. Additionally, 1,805 shares were withheld to cover tax obligations from previously vested awards, leaving Kaiser with a direct holding of 144,128 shares of Class A common stock.

feed.title: Portillo's (PTLO) CIO receives 27,173 RSUs and ends with 88,810 shares
feed.summary: Portillo's Chief Information Officer, Keith M. Correia, was granted 27,173 restricted stock units (RSUs) with a three-year vesting schedule, contingent on his continued service. Additionally, 1,206 shares were withheld to cover tax obligations from previously vested awards. Following these transactions, Correia directly holds 88,810 shares of Portillo's Class A common stock.

feed.title: Riot Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Riot Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: RIOT) has announced its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call for Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 4:30 P.M. EST. The call will be an audio-only webcast, requiring registration for both online participants and those who wish to dial in. A replay will be made available after the event.

feed.title: [Form 4] VERISIGN INC/CA Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: VERISIGN INC/CA EVP Danny R. McPherson reported a disposition of 26.7263 common shares at $275.26 per share on April 15, 2026. This transaction was for tax withholding purposes related to vesting restricted stock units and not an open-market sale. Following this, McPherson directly owns 40,195.1627 Verisign shares.

feed.title: Portillo's (NASDAQ: PTLO) awards 40,760 RSUs to Chief Development Officer
feed.summary: Portillo's Inc. (NASDAQ: PTLO) has awarded 40,760 restricted stock units (RSUs) to its Chief Development Officer, Jennifer Pecoraro-Striepling. These RSUs, granted on April 15, 2026, are subject to time-based vesting, with one-third vesting on each of the first three anniversaries of the grant date, contingent on her continued service. Following this award, Pecoraro-Striepling directly holds 40,760 shares of Class A common stock.

feed.title: Portillo's (PTLO) CPO granted 40,760 RSUs, 1,818 shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Portillo's Inc.'s Chief People Officer, Jill Francine Waite, was granted 40,760 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 15, 2026, which will vest over three years. Concurrently, 1,818 shares were withheld to cover tax obligations from previously vested awards. Following these transactions, Waite directly holds 134,018 shares of Portillo's Class A common stock.

feed.title: Portillo’s (NASDAQ: PTLO) CFO receives 90,579-share grant, 3,945 shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Portillo's CFO Michelle Greig Hook received an equity award of 90,579 Class A common stock shares as restricted stock units, subject to time-based vesting over three years. Concurrently, 3,945 shares were withheld at $5.52 per share to cover tax obligations from previous awards. Following these transactions, Hook directly holds 305,314 shares of Portillo’s Class A common stock.

feed.title: Constellation Brands (STZ) CEO receives RSUs and large option grant
feed.summary: Constellation Brands (STZ) CEO Nicholas I. Fink received significant equity compensation, including 85,385 restricted stock units (RSUs) and 415,295 non-qualified stock options. The RSUs vest over three years, delivering Class A Common Stock, while the options allow for the purchase of Class 1 (convertible) Common Stock at an exercise price of $164.50 per share, also vesting annually over three years and expiring in April 2036. This compensation package is designed to align the CEO's interests with long-term company performance.

feed.title: RiverNorth Opportunities Fund, Inc. and RiverNorth/DoubleLine Strategic Opportunity Fund, Inc. Announce Preferred Dividends
feed.summary: RiverNorth Opportunities Fund, Inc. and RiverNorth/DoubleLine Strategic Opportunity Fund, Inc. have declared preferred dividends for the second quarter of 2026. The distributions are set with an Ex Date and Record Date of May 1, 2026, and a Payable Date of May 15, 2026. Different distribution rates per share are detailed for various series of preferred stock for both funds.

feed.title: Pfizer (PFE) CEO Albert Bourla receives 911 phantom stock units as deferred pay
feed.summary: Pfizer's Chairman & CEO, Albert Bourla, has been granted 911 phantom stock units as part of a deferred compensation plan. These units, valued at $27.11 each, represent an entitlement to a cash payment equivalent to Pfizer's common stock value upon his separation from service. This transaction increases Bourla's total phantom stock unit holdings to 760,090, reflecting deferred compensation rather than direct stock purchases or sales.

feed.title: Best Buy (NYSE: BBY) chair emeritus discloses 23,166-share stock gifts
feed.summary: Richard M. Schulze, Chairman Emeritus of Best Buy (NYSE: BBY), reported gifting 23,166 shares of company common stock on April 15, 2026. These were bona fide gifts to indirect accounts associated with his spouse and a revocable trust, with a stated price of $0.00 per share, indicating non-cash transfers rather than sales. Following these transactions, the revocable trust continues to hold over 11.4 million Best Buy shares indirectly, while other indirect holdings include various spousal accounts, a 401(k), IRA, and a limited partnership.

feed.title: Fertitta-linked entity writes calls on 275,000 Wynn (WYNN) shares
feed.summary: An entity associated with Tilman J. Fertitta, Hospitality Headquarters, Inc., sold call options on 275,000 shares of Wynn Resorts Ltd (WYNN) common stock. These options have a strike price of $121.00, an expiration date of October 16, 2026, and generated a premium of $4.6831 per share. This transaction is considered a portfolio structuring move rather than a direct sale of common stock, providing upfront income while capping upside for the covered shares.

feed.title: Quanta Services (NYSE: PWR) grants 5-year performance stock units to executives
feed.summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) has approved long-term incentive awards in the form of performance stock units (PSUs) for several senior leaders, including Earl C. Austin, Jr., Jayshree S. Desai, Karl W. Studer, and Gerald A. Ducey, Jr. These PSUs are tied to a five-year performance period ending December 31, 2030, with the potential to earn 0% to 600% of the target amount based on adjusted earnings per share and total shareholder return. The awards are designed to incentivize and retain key personnel responsible for executing the company's five-year business strategy and financial goals.

feed.title: Smucker shareholders get $1.10 dividend June 1; meeting is Aug. 12
feed.summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) has declared a regular dividend of $1.10 per share, payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company also announced that its Annual Meeting of Shareholders will be held virtually on Wednesday, August 12, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. ET. Shareholders eligible to vote will need their 16-digit control number to access the webcast and participate in voting.

feed.title: Booking Holdings (BKNG) CEO Glenn Fogel sells 16,726 shares in 10b5-1 trades
feed.summary: Booking Holdings CEO Glenn D. Fogel sold 16,726 shares of common stock on April 15, 2026, through multiple open-market trades at prices ranging from approximately $183 to $186 per share. These sales were conducted under a Rule 10b5-1(c) trading plan established on December 9, 2024. Following these transactions, Fogel directly holds 298,174 shares and indirectly holds an additional 345,500 shares via a grantor retained annuity trust.

feed.title: EQT (EQT) director Jackson receives 4,116 shares and 3,320 new RSUs
feed.summary: EQT Corp director Kathryn Jean Jackson reported routine equity compensation changes. On April 14, 2026, 4,116 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) granted in April 2025 vested, resulting in her receiving 4,116 shares of EQT common stock. She also received a new grant of 3,320 RSUs, scheduled to vest on the date of EQT’s 2027 Annual Meeting of Shareholders.

feed.title: May 7 brings Rocket Lab earnings report, investor call at 5 p.m. ET
feed.summary: Rocket Lab (Nasdaq: RKLB) announced that its First Quarter 2026 financial results will be released after U.S. market close on Thursday, May 7, 2026. A conference call and live webcast will follow at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET, available on the company's Investor Relations website. Previous similar announcements have often resulted in a positive stock price movement, with the company’s stock currently trading above its 200-day moving average.

feed.title: ProPetro Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: ProPetro Holding Corp. (NYSE: PUMP) announced its first quarter 2026 earnings release will be issued on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, before trading opens. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 8:00 AM Central Time to discuss the results. Interested participants can access the call via phone or webcast on ProPetro’s website.

feed.title: Radian posts Q1 results May 6, investor webcast follows May 7
feed.summary: Radian Group Inc. (NYSE: RDN) announced it will hold a conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern time to discuss its first quarter 2026 results. The results will be released after market close on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The conference call will be webcast live on the company's website, with dial-in options for the Q&A session.

feed.title: The J.M. Smucker Co. Declares Dividend and Announces Annual Shareholder Meeting Date
feed.summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. announced that its Board of Directors approved a regular dividend of $1.10 per share, payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company also stated that its Annual Meeting of Shareholders will be a virtual-only event held on Wednesday, August 12, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Shareholders of record by June 15, 2026, will be eligible to participate and vote.

feed.title: NiSource Announces Strategic Energy Infrastructure Agreements to Enhance Customer Value and Economic Growth in Indiana
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. has announced new strategic energy infrastructure agreements, including a long-term contract with a subsidiary of Alphabet Inc. for a large-scale data center in northern Indiana, and an expanded agreement with Amazon Data Services, Inc. These agreements, utilizing NiSource's NIPSCO Generation LLC (GenCo) model, are expected to generate approximately $1.25 billion in cost savings for existing customers, equivalent to $90-$115 annually per residential customer, while also fostering economic growth and creating jobs in Indiana. The initiatives aim to improve grid reliability and resilience, with service for Alphabet beginning in summer 2026 and accelerated cost savings and site activation for Amazon's existing facilities.

feed.title: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings to leave the company in June
feed.summary: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings has announced his departure from the company in June to focus on philanthropy and other endeavors. Hastings, currently serving as chairman of Netflix's board, will not seek re-election when his term expires. He expressed confidence in Co-Chief Executives Ted Sarandos and Greg Peters to lead the company forward.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Announces First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) will host its first-quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The company will release its financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, before the market opens on the same day. Investors can access a live webcast and supplemental information on the company's website.

feed.title: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Date
feed.summary: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NASDAQ: REFI) has announced that it will release its first quarter 2026 earnings before market open on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The company will also host a conference call and live audio webcast for the general public at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss its financial results.
